name: Starlink Group 17-24
description: A batch of 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation - SpaceX's project for space-based Internet communication system.
program_description: Starlink is a satellite internet constellation operated by American aerospace company SpaceX
rocket_fact: The 'pogo oscillation' is a dangerous vibration caused by fuel surging in the pipes, which can shake a rocket to pieces.
